Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's nothing I need to do[n]at the faculty office right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear Ms. Toriumi's voice from inside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I could try to talk to her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the faculty office. It looks like I can't[n]get in through the door on this side...[n]{f 1 1}
